Meaning.En: A covering for the head, typically with a brim and a crown, worn for protection, warmth, or as a fashion accessory.
Meaning.Example: She adjusted her wide-brimmed hat before stepping into the sunlight.

Situation.Vi: Người đi biển đội mũ rộng vành để tránh nắng.
Situation.En: A person wears a wide-brimmed hat while at the beach to avoid sun exposure.

Situation.Vi: Nhân viên xây dựng đội mũ bảo hiểm thay vì mũ thông thường.
Situation.En: Construction workers wear hard hats instead of regular hats for safety.

Meaning.Vi: Mũ (dùng trong ẩn dụ: “take off one’s hat” = ghi nhận, kính nể)
Meaning.En: An object or symbol used metaphorically to represent respect or admiration (e.g., in the phrase “take off one’s hat to someone”).
Meaning.Example: He took off his hat to the team for their incredible effort and dedication.

Situation.Vi: Người đứng đầu công ty gỡ mũ để bày tỏ sự ngưỡng mộ trước thành tích của nhân viên.
Situation.En: The company CEO “took off his hat” to the employees for their record-breaking performance.
